decisions.decision: Signed postbacks must fail closed if salt is missing or lookup fails
decisions.rationale: Avoid silent security downgrade where attackers can supply sig but bypass validation

decisions.decision: Admin UI authenticates via JWT login endpoint and stores auth_token
decisions.rationale: Align UI with backend auth middleware and remove manual X-Api-Key header dependence

next_action: Start a new milestone (or append Phase 08+) and plan the next work.
context_notes: Milestone v1.0 is complete and gsd-tools reports 100% plans. This pause-work handoff is for clean resumption across sessions.

constraints.description: When writing markdown via shell heredocs, avoid unquoted heredocs/backticks because the shell will expand $VARS and `...` and can corrupt files. Use a quoted heredoc (<<'EOF') or escape backticks.
admin-ui/.gitignore originally ignored the path 'logs' broadly; avoid generic ignore patterns that shadow source directories (use /logs for top-level log folders).
